text: my dentist said i need a crown and i was like finally someone recognizes my potential
bought a weighted blanket drunk at 3am and honestly its the best decision ive ever made
my therapist fired me lol didnt even know that was possible
the wifi at this hotel is powered by a hamster on life support
i put a passive aggressive note on the fridge and my roommate framed it
spent 47 dollars on skincare then slept in my makeup again
someone hit reply all to a 200 person email thread to say 'thanks'. i am in agony
my husband started a podcast. pray for me
called my son to fix the bluetooth again he sighed so loud the phone vibrated
gas station sushi hits different at 2am and by different i mean hospital
havent slept in 3 days but my skin is clearing up so thats something
my aunt posted my childhood photo in the family group chat im moving countries
the hospital charged me 400 dollars for a tylenol i could cry
drunk ordered a life size cutout of danny devito no regrets honestly
my neighbor left a note saying my music is too loud. its been off for a week
tried to sleep on a red eye flight. the baby behind me chose violence
my mom discovered voice messages. i now receive 4 minute monologues daily
been on hold with insurance for 2 hours they keep playing the same jazz loop
my uber driver took the scenic route through 3 different zip codes
accidentally liked my ex's photo from 2019 while showing my friend. im deceased
the office thermostat war has entered its third week. alliances have formed
woke up to find drunk me signed up for a marathon. sober me cant run to the fridge
my flight got cancelled and they offered me a 5 dollar meal voucher. for an airport
family group chat now has 47 unread messages its been 20 minutes
the passive aggressive sticky notes in this office kitchen could fill a novel
bought a gym membership drunk. went once. the sauna was nice tho
my doctor googled my symptoms in front of me. we are cooked
someone stole my lunch from the work fridge again. i hope you enjoy my spite salad
airport wifi wants me to watch a 30 second ad for 15 minutes of dialup speed internet
my grandma just discovered emojis and every text ends with the skull emoji now
sleep is a myth invented by mattress companies and im starting to believe it
got a 9000 dollar bill for an ER visit where they told me to drink water
drunk purchased rosetta stone japanese at 1am. i dont even travel
my coworker microwaves fish every single day. this is my villain origin story
the hotel said ocean view and technically the ocean was visible if you leaned off the balcony
my mother in law joined our family group chat and now nobody speaks freely
havent slept more than 4 hours in a week and i can taste sounds now
left a note on my neighbors door about the dog barking. they left one back. its war
my health insurance denied a claim because apparently my left knee is a pre existing condition
drunk me bought 40 dollars of cheese from a fancy website. sober me is thriving tho
the airport lost my bag on a direct flight. how
someone in the family chat said 'we need to talk' and 14 people panicked simultaneously
my wifi drops every time the microwave runs. welcome to my smart home
wrote a passive aggressive email so polished my boss complimented my communication skills
woke up with a receipt for a 200 dollar lego set i dont remember buying. its so cool tho
been awake since tuesday and the shadow people are actually pretty chill
my copay went up again but at least the waiting room magazines are from this decade now
booked the cheapest hostel in europe. there were chickens in the bathroom
my dad figured out how to forward emails. i now get 12 chain letters a day
the person next to me on the plane took both armrests. absolute psychopath behavior
put a note on my desk saying do not touch. someone moved the note
drunk subscribed to 6 streaming services in one night. im now a content connoisseur
my fitbit congratulated me on my steps. i was just pacing from anxiety
called in sick then ran into my boss at target. we made eye contact in the cereal aisle
the wifi password at this cafe is 27 characters long and case sensitive. im going home
my aunt shared a minion meme about vaccines in the family chat. 48 replies in 10 min
havent slept and just put orange juice in my cereal. didnt even notice til halfway thru
urgent care charged me 800 bucks to tell me its just stress. yeah i know
left a polite note about parking and got a not polite note back with spelling errors
drunk bought a domain name for a business idea i cant even remember now
my luggage went to frankfurt. i went to lisbon. we are not the same
someone added my work email to the family group chat. my worlds are colliding
the smart fridge is connected to wifi but wont tell me why its beeping at 3am
wrote 'per my last email' and felt a rush of power like nothing else
woke up to a confirmation email for 4 inflatable dinosaur costumes. halloween is in 7 months
running on 2 hours of sleep and vibes. mostly vibes
my insurance said therapy isnt medically necessary. bro look at me
hostel roommate snored so loud the walls shook. i slept in the lobby
uncle posted happy birthday on my wall 3 months late with a stock photo of a cake
the neighbor put a note under my door about 'excessive cooking smells'. i made toast
my bluetooth speaker connected to my moms phone across the house. she heard everything
bought a 90 dollar essential oil diffuser at 4am. my apartment smells incredible at least
been awake so long i forgot what day it is. apparently its thursday. unbelievable
got an EOB from insurance that looks like it was written in ancient sumerian
my flight had 3 layovers and one was in a country i didnt have a visa for. fun times
grandma discovered the family group chat mute button. power move honestly
someone keeps stealing my clearly labeled yogurt from the work fridge. i will find you
the wifi at my airbnb requires a blood sacrifice and a router restart every 20 min
left a note saying please dont slam the door and they slammed it harder. message received
drunk enrolled in an online cooking class. first lesson is tomorrow help
4 hours of sleep in 3 days and autocorrect cant even save my texts anymore
pharmacy said my prescription costs 340 dollars WITH insurance. cool cool cool
sat on the tarmac for 4 hours and they gave us half a cup of water. luxury
my cousin changed the family group chat name to 'dysfunction junction'. nobody argued
the neighbors wifi is called 'FBI Surveillance Van' and honestly respect
wrote such a passive aggressive slack message that HR scheduled a meeting
drunk bought concert tickets for a band i dont even listen to. going anyway
havent slept and just waved back at someone who was waving at the person behind me
my doctor referred me to a specialist who referred me to another specialist. im in a loop
booked a window seat for the views. the window was between two walls
my dad sent 'ok' in the family chat and 6 people asked if hes mad
the office printer jams every time i have a deadline. its personal at this point
our airbnb host left a 3 page note about trash sorting. we were there one night
drunk me signed up for a 5k color run. sober me is allergic to running and colors apparently
going on hour 30 no sleep and the ceiling fan is my best friend now
insurance approved my mri but denied the follow up to discuss the mri results. make it make sense
my suitcase wheel broke on cobblestone in rome. dragged it 2 miles like a war hero
someone replied to a year old message in the family chat and started a whole new argument
hotel wifi cut out during my zoom interview. got the job anyway somehow
left a note on the shared microwave saying 'please cover your food' with a smiley face. im furious
